audit_policy.cost_note: Tennessee residents aged 65+ may attend credit courses at TBR community colleges with tuition and most mandatory fees waived under Tenn. Code Ann. § 49-7-113. A small service fee may still apply. Standard tuition applies to all other audit students.

senior_discount.notes: Tenn. Code Ann. § 49-7-113 allows Tennessee residents aged 65+ to attend credit courses at TBR institutions with tuition and most mandatory fees waived on a space-available basis.

steps: Complete an admissions application
Contact the Records Office about audit enrollment or the senior tuition waiver
Register during the normal enrollment period
application_process.timing: Register during the normal enrollment period

restrictions: Audit policies may vary — confirm with the college
Financial aid does not cover audited courses
Senior tuition waiver applies on a space-available basis
